description: Call to Arms Patch 2 (31 March 2021) — New Hide Mob and Mount: Moose, Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: New Hide Mob and Mount: Moose

items.text: Moose have been added to the forest biome as a T6 Hide Mob
Their lootable offspring (Moose Calf) can be grown into adults in a pasture
Grown Moose can be saddled and ridden as a mount
Moose share a Mount Skin category with Giant Stags

sections.searchable_text: New Hide Mob and Mount: Moose Moose have been added to the forest biome as a T6 Hide Mob Their lootable offspring (Moose Calf) can be grown into adults in a pasture Grown Moose can be saddled and ridden as a mount Moose share a Mount Skin category with Giant Stags

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Significantly increased Faction Points awarded for PvP knockouts and kills
Using a new Randomized Dungeon Map now cancels your previous reservation
Added Hellgate Infamy to player stats menu
Respawn time for Faction Outpost bosses: 90s → 30s (NPC respawns are still temporarily blocked if the outpost has recently been contested)

stats.name: Respawn time for Faction Outpost bosses

items.text: Players entering a new Hellgate will now always receive a protection bubble
[MOBILE] Joystick Controls: Added an "Attack Closest Target" Option to enable the Attack Button selecting the closest target to you if a previous target was not selected manually
Significantly improved the feedback when receiving Faction Points for both the combat log and overhead messages
Marketplace mails will now be deleted after 30 days (previously 60)

sections.searchable_text: Changes Significantly increased Faction Points awarded for PvP knockouts and kills Using a new Randomized Dungeon Map now cancels your previous reservation Added Hellgate Infamy to player stats menu Hellgates: decreased lava speed by 30% Respawn time for Faction Outpost bosses: 90s → 30s (NPC respawns are still temporarily blocked if the outpost has recently been contested) Players entering a new Hellgate will now always receive a protection bubble [MOBILE] Joystick Controls: Added an "Attack Closest Target" Option to enable the Attack Button selecting the closest target to you if a previous target was not selected manually Significantly improved the feedback when receiving Faction Points for both the combat log and overhead messages Marketplace mails will now be deleted after 30 days (previously 60)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Faction Warfare: resolved an issue that could result in a player respawning at an Outpost in lethal zones
Fixed an issue where equipping via Loadouts did not handle Destiny Board locked items correctly
Corrupted Dungeons: visual effects for Infernal Horror's "Liquid Fire" spell now stay visible for the whole duration
[MOBILE] Fixed an issue where resetting the Interface or Control options would not update certain settings
Additional minor graphical, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
